positive: A seamless, highly stylized mandala-inspired geometric pattern featuring interconnected crystalline celestial elements, mystical flora, and abstract cosmic pathways. The design should utilize a vibrant jewel-toned palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and gold accents. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, creating a continuous, high-contrast, repeating pattern suitable for full garment print. Crisp linework, flat vector aesthetics combined with subtle iridescent glow, inspired by sacred geometry and stained glass art. Central focal point is a stylized blooming cosmic lotus flower. High detail, commercial vector art style, volumetric lighting, studio shot, clean white background.
